entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to root-knot nematodes.

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE JAVANICA
entities.description: A root-knot nematode pest that affects pigeonpea.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea cultivars and accessions to withstand or avoid infection by M. javanica.

entities.name: GALL NUMBER
entities.description: The number of galls formed on the roots, used as a measure of resistance.

entities.name: EGG MASSES
entities.description: The presence and number of egg masses on the roots, used as a measure of resistance.

entities.name: GALL SIZE
entities.description: The size of the galls formed on the roots, used as a measure of resistance.

entities.name: ROOT GALL AREA
entities.description: The area of the root covered with galls, used as a measure of resistance.

entities.name: SHOOT MASS
entities.description: The mass of the shoot, which can be reduced by M. javanica infection.

entities.name: PLANT WEIGHT
entities.description: The overall weight of the plant, used to assess the impact of nematode infestation.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biomass of the vegetative parts of the plant.

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain growth despite nematode infestation.

entities.name: NEMATODE-INFESTED SOIL
entities.description: Soil containing M. javanica used to evaluate plant reactions.

entities.name: RESISTANCE EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing cultivars and accessions based on gall and egg mass parameters.

entities.name: PANT A3
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar identified as highly resistant to M. javanica.

entities.name: BDN 2
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar identified as highly resistant to M. javanica.

entities.name: ANM 504
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar identified as highly resistant to M. javanica.

entities.name: ICP 24
entities.description: A pigeonpea accession identified as moderately resistant to M. javanica.

entities.name: ICP 99
entities.description: A pigeonpea accession identified as moderately resistant to M. javanica.

entities.name: UPAS 120
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar showing no egg masses on roots.

entities.name: CO 1
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar showing no egg masses on roots.
